summary: Phase P0 testing complete. All backend (24/24) and frontend tests passing. Tested: registration+welcome email, offer expiration system (filter/my-services/admin-settings/reactivate), and UI components for expiry badges.

issues: Route is /support, not /vzajemna-pomoc (review request mentioned /vzajemna-pomoc). Nav link says 'Vzájemná podpora' which is correct. No bug, just documentation note.

critical_code_review_comments: SENDER_EMAIL in .env contains angle brackets: 'Bloom <noreply@budsva.eu>' - this is correct RFC 5322 format and should work with Resend API
Welcome email is non-blocking (wrapped in try/except) - registration succeeds even if email fails
Expiry filter in GET /api/services uses ISO string comparison which works correctly for UTC timestamps
GET /api/services/my returns ALL services including expired (no expiry filter) - this is the intended behavior
GET /users/{user_id}/public-profile also returns all services without expiry filter - expired shows with badge
seed_data_creation: Created test services via API; manually set one service (id: 40d9b653-0916-43c8-9eaf-6ee9ec6975eb) expires_at to past date for expiry filter testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features fully tested and working: 1) Registration+welcome email (Resend configured with Bloom <noreply@budsva.eu>), 2) Offer expiry system (expired filtered from /api/services, visible in /api/services/my and user profile, admin can reactivate), 3) Admin settings for expiry days (14/30/60/90 with default 30). SupportPage route is /support (not /vzajemna-pomoc). Expired badge uses CSS uppercase class so DOM text is 'Expirováno' but displays as 'EXPIROVÁNO'. Test user for expiry: service id 40d9b653-0916-43c8-9eaf-6ee9ec6975eb.

feature_test_results.welcome_email_config: PASS - Resend key=set, sender=Bloom <noreply@budsva.eu>, log shows 'Welcome email sent to TEST_p0_da9b4bd3@test.com'
feature_test_results.get_services_hides_expired: PASS - Expired offer NOT in GET /api/services public feed
feature_test_results.get_my_services_shows_expired: PASS - Expired offer IS in GET /api/services/my
feature_test_results.reactivate_expired_offer: PASS - PUT /api/admin/services/{id}/reactivate works, returns future expires_at
feature_test_results.new_service_has_expires_at: PASS - New service created with expires_at ~30 days from now
feature_test_results.support_page_loads: PASS - /support loads, shows 22 services, no expired in public feed
feature_test_results.admin_settings_expiry_ui: PASS - 'Platnost nabídek' section with 14/30/60/90 buttons, clicking works
feature_test_results.admin_services_expirováno_badge: PASS - Expirováno badge visible, Obnovit button present for expired offers
feature_test_results.user_profile_expired_badge: PASS - Expired offer shown in profile with EXPIROVÁNO badge
feature_test_results.my_services_expired_visible: PASS - My services view shows expired offer with EXPIROVÁNO badge + helper message
